theorem:  merge_permut
sample:   2
attempt:  init

[proof]
induction xs generalizing ys with
| nil =>
  simp [merge, Permut]
| cons x xs IH =>
  induction ys with
  | nil =>
    simp [merge, Permut]
  | cons y ys =>
    by_cases h : x < y
    · simp [merge, h, Permut]
      intro t
      simp [count1]
      exact IH (y :: ys) t
    · simp [merge, h, Permut]
      intro t
      simp [count1]
      exact (IH ys t)

[lean error]
location:
            simp [count1]
            exact (IH ys t)
           ^
error: Type mismatch
  IH ys t
has type
  count1 (merge xs ys) t = count1 (xs ++ ys) t
but is expected to have type
  (if y = t then 1 else 0) + count1 (merge (x :: xs) ys) t = (if x = t then 1 else 0) + count1 (xs ++ y :: ys) t
